summary: Tested comprehensive AI features for FaceConnect PWA. Backend: 21/21 API tests pass (100%). Frontend: All AI features verified - Chat, Create (Image/Caption), Search tabs working correctly. AI uses real LLM APIs (GPT-5.2 for chat, Gemini 3 Flash for suggestions, GPT Image 1 for image generation).

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge slightly overlaps bottom nav on mobile - does not block functionality but may reduce clickable area

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI features fully tested and working: 1) AI Chat with 4 personas (GPT-5.2) 2) Image generation (GPT Image 1 - may take up to 1 min) 3) Caption generation with mood selection (Gemini 3 Flash) 4) AI-powered search with intelligent interpretation 5) Quick replies and text suggestions 6) History viewing and clearing for privacy. All APIs use real Emergent LLM integrations via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. BottomNav includes AI tab with Bot icon at position 3.
